characters.appearance: Mid-20s female, slim build, medium complexion. Straight dark brown hair past shoulders, wearing black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Bright pink button-down shirt, light blue jeans. Gold necklace, gold bracelet, watch, and a small lapel microphone.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: दोस्तों, अगर आपकी उम्र भी 30 या 40 के पार है, [Friends, even if you are over 30 or 40,]
Character A says: तो भी आप बिना झिझक के इंग्लिश बोलना सीख सकते हैं। [you can still learn to speak English without hesitation.]
Character A says: Supernova के AI ट्यूटर के साथ। ये देखो। [With Supernova's AI tutor. Look at this.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the target demographic (older/working learners) by validating their age.
- Replaces the aggressive '7-day guarantee' with a realistic, encouraging promise of speaking without hesitation.
- Introduces Supernova's core AI tutor feature.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे इंटरव्यू के लिए इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करनी है। [I want to practice English for an interview.]
App Voice says: Great! Let's practice your interview skills. [Great! Let's practice your interview skills.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's functionality in a real-world context (interview prep).
- Shifts focus from simple translation to interactive speaking practice with an AI tutor.
- Shows practical, immediate utility for a working professional.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
AI Tutor Active
Interview Practice
मुझे इंटरव्यू के लिए इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करनी है
Great! Let's practice your interview skills.
Tap to Speak
Daily Lessons
Real-world situations

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: देखा? कितना आसान है! [See? How easy it is!]
Character A says: ऐसे ही आप भी अपनी भाषा से रोज़ इंग्लिश बोलने की practice कर सकते हैं। [Just like this, you too can practice speaking English every day from your own language.]
Character A says: तो अभी प्ले स्टोर पर जाइये, [So go to the Play Store right now,]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff: relief that learning is accessible and easy.
- Emphasizes 'daily practice' and 'from your own language', aligning with Supernova's Hindi-medium approach.
- Sets up the final call to action.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड कीजिये। [and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Directs the user to download the app.
- Replaces the competitor brand name with Supernova.
